meta.dc:title: Appointment; qualifications; removal; ineligibility of councilmembers

section.heading: Appointment; qualifications; removal; ineligibility of councilmembers

content.p: There shall be a city manager who shall be the chief administrative officer of the city. The city manager shall be appointed for an indefinite term by the council and shall serve at the pleasure of the council, provided that the city manager shall not be removed from office except by the affirmative votes of at least five members of the council. The city manager shall be chosen on the basis of the person's executive and administrative qualifications, with special reference to actual experience in, or knowledge of, accepted practice in respect to the duties of office as hereinafter set forth.
No councilmember shall be eligible for appointment to the office of city manager during the term for which that councilmember shall have been elected nor within two years thereafter.
